pids.name: Engine Run Time for AECD #1 - #5
pids.description: Total engine run time with EI-AECD #1-#5 active (Timer 1 and Timer 2). Timer 1 = reduced effectiveness <75%. Timer 2 = reduced effectiveness ≥75%. Single-timer AECDs use Timer 1 only; Timer 2 reports $FFFFFFFF. Reset only on NVM reset. Overflow: all counters divided by 2.
pids.description_zh: EI-AECD #1-#5激活时的总发动机运行时间（计时器1和2）。计时器1=降低排放控制有效性<75%。计时器2=降低排放控制有效性≥75%。仅使用单计时器的AECD使用计时器1；计时器2报告$FFFFFFFF。仅在NVM重置时清零。溢出时所有计数器除以2。

items.label: AECD1_5_SUP
items.name: Support of Run Time for AECD #1 - #5

items.name: Total run time with EI-AECD #1 Timer 1 active

items.name_zh: EI-AECD #1计时器2激活总运行时间

pids.note: Counters reset only on NVM reset. Not cleared by Service $04. If any counter reaches max, all divided by 2 before incrementing.

pids.name: NOx Sensor
pids.description: Raw, uncorrected NOx sensor signal. 1 ppm/bit. 2016 MY+ may also require corrected output via PID $A1. Bits 4-7 of A indicate data availability (1 = no fault but no results; data reports $FFFF).
pids.description_zh: 原始未校正NOx传感器信号。1 ppm/位。2016年及以后车型可能还需通过PID $A1输出校正值。A字节位4-7指示数据可用性（1=无故障但无结果；数据报告$FFFF）。

items.label: NOX11
items.name: NOx Sensor Concentration Bank 1 Sensor 1
items.name_zh: NOx传感器浓度 气缸组1传感器1

items.label: NOX12
items.name: NOx Sensor Concentration Bank 1 Sensor 2
items.name_zh: NOx传感器浓度 气缸组1传感器2

items.label: NOX21
items.name: NOx Sensor Concentration Bank 2 Sensor 1
items.name_zh: NOx传感器浓度 气缸组2传感器1

items.label: NOX22
items.name: NOx Sensor Concentration Bank 2 Sensor 2
items.name_zh: NOx传感器浓度 气缸组2传感器2

pids.name: Manifold Surface Temperature
pids.description: MST displays intake manifold surface temperature. May be from sensor or inferred. 1°C/bit with -40°C offset.
pids.description_zh: MST显示进气歧管表面温度。可来自传感器或推算。1°C/位带-40°C偏移。

pids.name: NOx Control System
pids.description: Average reagent consumption, average demanded reagent consumption, reagent tank level, and total run time while NOx warning mode is activated. Not applicable to spark-ignition engines.
pids.description_zh: 平均还原剂消耗量、平均需求还原剂消耗量、还原剂储罐液位以及NOx警告模式激活时的总运行时间。不适用于点火式发动机。

items.label: NOX_CTRL_SUP
items.name: Support of NOx Reagent System Data

items.label: REAG_DEMD
items.name: Average Demanded Reagent Consumption
items.name_zh: 平均需求还原剂消耗量

items.label: NWI_TIME
items.name: Total run time while NOx warning mode is activated
items.name_zh: NOx警告模式激活时的总运行时间
items.note: Reset to 0 when warning changes from deactivated to activated. Reset to 0 if not activated for 400 days or 9600 engine hours. Not erasable by scan tool.

bits.name: Average Reagent Consumption supported
bits.name_zh: 平均还原剂消耗量支持

bits.name: Average Demanded Reagent Consumption supported
bits.name_zh: 平均需求还原剂消耗量支持

bits.name: NOx warning mode run time supported
bits.name_zh: NOx警告模式运行时间支持

pids.name: Particulate Matter Sensor
pids.description: PM mass concentration for Bank 1/2 Sensor 1. 0.0125 mg/m³ per bit.
pids.description_zh: 气缸组1/2传感器1的PM质量浓度。0.0125 mg/m³/位。

items.label: PM11
items.name: PM Sensor Mass Concentration Bank 1 Sensor 1
items.name_zh: PM传感器质量浓度 气缸组1传感器1

items.label: PM21
items.name: PM Sensor Mass Concentration Bank 2 Sensor 1
items.name_zh: PM传感器质量浓度 气缸组2传感器1

bits.name: PM Mass Concentration B1S1 supported
bits.name_zh: PM质量浓度组1传感器1支持

bits.name: PM Mass Concentration B2S1 supported
bits.name_zh: PM质量浓度组2传感器1支持

pids.name: Intake Manifold Absolute Pressure
pids.description: MAP A/B from a Manifold Absolute Pressure sensor. 0.03125 kPa/bit. If vehicle uses both MAP and MAF, both PIDs shall be supported.
pids.description_zh: 由歧管绝对压力传感器获取的MAP A/B。0.03125 kPa/位。如车辆同时使用MAP和MAF传感器，两个PID均应支持。

items.label: MAP_SUP
items.name: Support of Intake Manifold Absolute Pressure Data
items.name_zh: 进气歧管绝对压力数据支持

pids.name: SCR Inducement System
pids.description: Byte A = actual state (bits 0-3 reason, bit 7 active). Byte B = 10K/20K history (bits 0-3 current 10K, bits 4-7 previous 10K). Byte C = 30K/40K history (bits 0-3, bits 4-7). Bytes D-M = distance numerators and denominator for 10K blocks. Not reset by Service $04.
pids.description_zh: 字节A=实际状态（位0-3原因，位7激活）。字节B=10K/20K历史（位0-3当前10K，位4-7上一10K）。字节C=30K/40K历史（位0-3，位4-7）。字节D-M=10K块的距离计数器和分母。不被Service $04重置。

items.label: SCR_IND_DIST_1N
items.name: Distance while inducement active in current 10K block
items.name_zh: 当前10K块内诱导激活时行驶距离

items.label: SCR_IND_DIST_2N
items.name: Distance while inducement active in 20K block (10-20K km)
items.name_zh: 20K块内诱导激活时行驶距离(10-20K km)

items.label: SCR_IND_DIST_3N
items.name: Distance while inducement active in 30K block (20-30K km)
items.name_zh: 30K块内诱导激活时行驶距离(20-30K km)

items.label: SCR_IND_DIST_4N
items.name: Distance while inducement active in 40K block (30-40K km)
items.name_zh: 40K块内诱导激活时行驶距离(30-40K km)

bits.name: Empty reagent tank actual state
bits.name_zh: 还原剂储罐空实际状态

bits.name: Incorrect reagent actual state
bits.name_zh: 还原剂不合格实际状态

bits.name: Deviation of reagent consumption actual state
bits.name_zh: 还原剂消耗偏差实际状态

bits.name: NOx emission too high actual state
Inducement system active actual state
bits.name_zh: 诱导系统激活实际状态

pids.note: History bits and distance counters not reset by Service $04 or battery disconnect. Only reset on NVM reset.

pids.name: Engine Run Time for AECD #11 - #15
pids.description: Same structure and rules as PID $81 for EI-AECD #11-#15.
pids.description_zh: 与PID $81结构和规则相同，适用于EI-AECD #11-#15。

items.label: AECD11_15_SUP
items.name: Support of Run Time for AECD #11-#15

pids.name: Engine Run Time for AECD #16 - #20
pids.description: Same structure and rules as PID $81 for EI-AECD #16-#20.
pids.description_zh: 与PID $81结构和规则相同，适用于EI-AECD #16-#20。

items.label: AECD16_20_SUP
items.name: Support of Run Time for AECD #16-#20

pids.name: Diesel Aftertreatment Status
pids.description: DPF regen status/type, NOx adsorber regen/desulfurization status, normalized DPF regen trigger (0%=clean, 100%=ready), average time and distance between DPF regens (EWMA filtered).
pids.description_zh: DPF再生状态/类型、NOx吸附器再生/脱硫状态、DPF再生归一化触发（0%=清洁，100%=就绪）、DPF再生间的平均时间和距离（EWMA滤波）。

bits.name: Average time between DPF regens supported
Average distance between DPF regens supported

pids.name: O2 Sensor (Wide Range)
pids.description: Wide-range O2 sensors on CI engines (B1S1/S2, B2S1/S2). Concentration: 0.001526 %/bit (0~100%). Lambda: 0.000122 λ/bit (0~7.99). CI vehicles do not use PIDs $13/$1D for O2 location.
pids.description_zh: 压燃式发动机宽域O2传感器（组1传感器1/2，组2传感器1/2）。浓度：0.001526 %/位（0~100%）。Lambda：0.000122 λ/位（0~7.99）。压燃式车辆不使用PID $13/$1D定义O2位置。

items.label: O2S11_PCT
items.name: O2 Sensor Concentration B1S1
items.name_zh: O2传感器浓度 组1传感器1

items.label: O2S12_PCT
items.name: O2 Sensor Concentration B1S2
items.name_zh: O2传感器浓度 组1传感器2

items.label: O2S21_PCT
items.name: O2 Sensor Concentration B2S1
items.name_zh: O2传感器浓度 组2传感器1

items.label: O2S22_PCT
items.name: O2 Sensor Concentration B2S2
items.name_zh: O2传感器浓度 组2传感器2

pids.name: Absolute Throttle Position G
pids.description: Absolute throttle position G (not relative or learned), normalized 0-100%. A single throttle plate can have up to 3 sensors (A,B,C); dual plates up to 4 (A,B,C,G).
pids.description_zh: 绝对节气门位置G（非相对或学习值），归一化0-100%。单节气门板最多3个传感器（A,B,C）；双节气门板最多4个（A,B,C,G）。

pids.name: Engine Friction - Percent Torque
pids.name_zh: 发动机摩擦百分比扭矩
pids.description: TQ_FR displays engine friction torque as a percent of reference torque (PID $63). Friction torque = torque to drive a fully equipped engine. Net Brake Torque = PID $62 (Indicated) - PID $8E (Friction). Will not be less than zero.
pids.description_zh: TQ_FR显示发动机摩擦扭矩，为参考扭矩(PID $63)的百分比。摩擦扭矩=驱动完全装备发动机所需扭矩。净制动扭矩=PID $62（指示）-PID $8E（摩擦）。不会小于零。

items.label: TQ_FR
items.name: Engine Friction - Percent Torque
items.name_zh: 发动机摩擦百分比扭矩

pids.name: Particulate Matter (PM) Sensor Output
pids.description: Normalized PM sensor output for Bank 1/2 Sensor 1. 0% = fully cleaned, 100% = soot load level needing regeneration. Signed, 0.01%/bit (-327.68~327.67%). Operating status bytes report active/regen status.
pids.description_zh: 气缸组1/2传感器1的归一化PM传感器输出。0%=完全清洁，100%=需要再生的积碳负荷。有符号，0.01%/位（-327.68~327.67%）。运行状态字节报告激活/再生状态。

items.label: PMOUT_SUP
items.name: Support of PM Sensor Output Data

items.label: PM11_OP
items.name: PM Sensor operating status B1S1
items.name_zh: PM传感器运行状态 组1传感器1

items.label: PM11_OUT
items.name: PM Sensor normalized output B1S1
items.name_zh: PM传感器归一化输出 组1传感器1

items.label: PM21_OP
items.name: PM Sensor operating status B2S1
items.name_zh: PM传感器运行状态 组2传感器1

items.label: PM21_OUT
items.name: PM Sensor normalized output B2S1
items.name_zh: PM传感器归一化输出 组2传感器1

bits.name: PM operating status B1S1 supported
bits.name_zh: PM运行状态组1传感器1支持

bits.name: PM operating status B2S1 supported
bits.name_zh: PM运行状态组2传感器1支持

bits.name: PM Sensor active status B1S1
bits.name_zh: PM传感器激活状态组1传感器1

bits.name_zh: PM传感器再生状态组1传感器1

bits.name_zh: PM传感器激活状态组2传感器1

bits.name: PM Sensor regen status B2S1
bits.name_zh: PM传感器再生状态组2传感器1

pids.name: WWH-OBD Vehicle OBD System Information
pids.description: WWH-OBD display strategy, vehicle MI status, emission system readiness, and continuous MI counter (hours). For WWH-OBD use case 1 (scan tool road worthiness check).
pids.description_zh: WWH-OBD显示策略、车辆MI状态、排放系统就绪状态和连续MI计数器（小时）。用于WWH-OBD用例1（扫描工具道路适行性检查）。

items.label: VOBD_MI_TIME
items.name: Continuous MI counter (engine operating hours)
items.name_zh: 连续MI计数器（发动机运行小时）

numeric_fields.label: MI_DISP_VOBD
numeric_fields.name: Discriminatory/non-discriminatory display strategy
numeric_fields.name_zh: 区分性/非区分性显示策略

pids.name: WWH-OBD ECU OBD System Information
pids.description: Individual ECU MI status (may differ from vehicle MI lamp), continuous MI counter, and highest B1 counter per ECU. For WWH-OBD, PID $01 Data A shall not be supported and always reported as $00.
pids.description_zh: 单个ECU的MI状态（可能与车辆MI灯不同）、连续MI计数器和每ECU最高B1计数器。对于WWH-OBD，PID $01数据A不应支持，始终报告$00。

pids.name: Fuel System Status (Compression Ignition)
pids.description: Closed-loop fuel control status for CI engines. Byte A = support (fuel pressure, injection quantity, injection timing, idle fuel balance for systems 1 and 2). Byte B = actual status (1 = closed loop). If engine off/ignition on, all Byte B bits report 0.
pids.description_zh: 压燃式发动机闭环燃油控制状态。字节A=支持（系统1和2的燃油压力、喷射量、喷射正时、怠速燃油平衡）。字节B=实际状态（1=闭环）。发动机关闭/点火开启时，字节B所有位报告0。

items.label: FUELSYS_SUP
items.name: Support of Fuel System CI Control Status
items.name_zh: 燃油系统CI控制状态支持

bits.name: Fuel Injection Timing Control 1 supported
bits.name_zh: 燃油喷射正时控制1支持

bits.name: Idle Fuel Balance/Contribution Control 1 supported
bits.name_zh: 怠速燃油平衡控制1支持

bits.name: Fuel Injection Timing Control 2 supported
bits.name_zh: 燃油喷射正时控制2支持

bits.name: Idle Fuel Balance/Contribution Control 2 supported
bits.name_zh: 怠速燃油平衡控制2支持

bits.name: Fuel Injection Timing Control 1 Status
bits.name_zh: 燃油喷射正时控制1状态

bits.name: Idle Fuel Balance/Contribution Control 1 Status
bits.name_zh: 怠速燃油平衡控制1状态

bits.name: Fuel Injection Timing Control 2 Status
bits.name_zh: 燃油喷射正时控制2状态

bits.name: Idle Fuel Balance/Contribution Control 2 Status
bits.name_zh: 怠速燃油平衡控制2状态

pids.name: WWH-OBD Vehicle OBD Counters
pids.description: Cumulative continuous MI counter. Increments any time the vehicle MI is in the on state. This counter shall not be reset.
pids.description_zh: 累计连续MI计数器。车辆MI处于开启状态时递增。此计数器不可重置。

pids.name: NOx Control - Driver Inducement System Status and Counters
pids.name_zh: NOx控制 - 驾驶员诱导系统状态和计数器
pids.description: NOx warning system activation, inducement levels 1-3 status (2-bit each: inactive/enabled/active/not supported), and five counters: reagent quality, reagent consumption, dosing activity, EGR valve, monitoring system (all 1h/bit, 0-65534h, 65535=not supported).
pids.description_zh: NOx警告系统激活、诱导级别1-3状态（各2位：不活动/使能/活动/不支持），以及五个计数器：还原剂质量、还原剂消耗、加注活动、EGR阀、监控系统（均1h/位，0-65534h，65535=不支持）。

items.label: NOX_IND_SUP
items.name: NOx warning and inducement systems supported

bits.name: NOx warning system activation status supported
bits.name_zh: NOx警告系统激活状态支持

bits.name: Reagent quality counter supported
bits.name_zh: 还原剂质量计数器支持

bits.name: Reagent consumption counter supported
bits.name_zh: 还原剂消耗计数器支持

bits.name: Absence of reagent dosing counter supported
bits.name_zh: 还原剂加注缺失计数器支持

pids.name: Hybrid/EV Vehicle System Data
pids.name_zh: 混合动力/EV车辆系统数据
pids.description: Hybrid/EV vehicle state (charge sustaining/depleting/increasing), battery system voltage (0.015625 V/bit, 0~1023.98 V), battery system current (signed, 0.1 A/bit, -3276.8~+3276.7 A, negative = charge, positive = discharge).
pids.description_zh: 混合动力/EV车辆状态（维持充电/消耗充电/增加充电）、电池系统电压（0.015625 V/位，0~1023.98 V）、电池系统电流（有符号，0.1 A/位，-3276.8~+3276.7 A，负=充电，正=放电）。

items.label: HEV_SUP
items.name: Support of Hybrid/EV Vehicle System Data
items.name_zh: 混合动力/EV车辆系统数据支持

items.label: HEV_BATT_V
items.name: Hybrid/EV Battery System Voltage
items.name_zh: 混合动力/EV电池系统电压

items.label: HEV_BATT_A
items.name: Hybrid/EV Battery System Current
items.name_zh: 混合动力/EV电池系统电流

bits.name: Hybrid/EV Vehicle State supported
bits.name_zh: 混合动力/EV车辆状态支持

bits.name: Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage supported
bits.name_zh: 混合动力/EV电池电压支持

bits.name: Hybrid/EV Battery Current supported
bits.name_zh: 混合动力/EV电池电流支持

bits.name: Enhanced Hybrid/EV Vehicle State supported
bits.name_zh: 增强型混合动力/EV车辆状态支持

numeric_fields.label: HEV_MODE_ENH
numeric_fields.name: Enhanced Hybrid/EV Charging State
numeric_fields.name_zh: 增强型混合动力/EV充电状态
numeric_fields.note: Support of bits 1-2 required when vehicle supports hybrid tracking TIDs in Service $09.

pids.name: Diesel Exhaust Fluid Sensor Output
pids.name_zh: 柴油排气液传感器输出
pids.description: DEF type (4-bit enum in A bits 4-7), DEF concentration (0.25%/bit, 0~63.75%), DEF tank temperature (1°C with -40°C offset, -40~215°C), DEF tank level (100/255 %/bit, 0~100%). DEF_LVL in PID $9B is same data as REAG_LVL in PID $85.
pids.description_zh: DEF类型（A位4-7的4位枚举）、DEF浓度（0.25%/位，0~63.75%）、DEF储罐温度（1°C带-40°C偏移，-40~215°C）、DEF储罐液位（100/255 %/位，0~100%）。PID $9B的DEF_LVL与PID $85的REAG_LVL数据相同。

enums.name: No sensor fault, no results available
enums.name_zh: 无传感器故障，无结果可用

pids.name: O2 Sensor (Wide Range) - Sensors 3/4
pids.name_zh: O2传感器（宽域）- 传感器3/4
pids.description: Wide-range O2 sensors on CI engines (B1S3/S4, B2S3/S4). Concentration: 0.001526 %/bit (0~100%). Lambda: 0.000122 λ/bit (0~7.99). CI vehicles do not use PIDs $13/$1D for O2 location.
pids.description_zh: 压燃式发动机宽域O2传感器（组1传感器3/4，组2传感器3/4）。浓度：0.001526 %/位（0~100%）。Lambda：0.000122 λ/位（0~7.99）。压燃式车辆不使用PID $13/$1D定义O2位置。

items.label: O2WR2_SUP
items.name: Support of O2 Sensor Data (Sensors 3/4)
items.name_zh: O2传感器数据支持（传感器3/4）

items.label: O2S13_PCT
items.name: O2 Sensor Concentration Bank 1 Sensor 3
items.name_zh: O2传感器浓度 组1传感器3

items.label: O2S14_PCT
items.name: O2 Sensor Concentration Bank 1 Sensor 4
items.name_zh: O2传感器浓度 组1传感器4

items.label: O2S23_PCT
items.name: O2 Sensor Concentration Bank 2 Sensor 3
items.name_zh: O2传感器浓度 组2传感器3

items.label: O2S24_PCT
items.name: O2 Sensor Concentration Bank 2 Sensor 4
items.name_zh: O2传感器浓度 组2传感器4

pids.name: Fuel Rate
pids.description: Engine fuel rate (fuel consumed by engine only, excludes aftertreatment injection) and vehicle fuel rate (engine + aftertreatment, excludes fuel-operated heater). 0.02 g/s per bit, 0~1310.7 g/s. Updated at minimum 1000 ms. Zero when engine not running.
pids.description_zh: 发动机燃油速率（仅发动机消耗的燃油，不含后处理喷射）和车辆燃油速率（发动机+后处理，不含燃油加热器）。0.02 g/s/位，0~1310.7 g/s。最低1000ms更新。发动机未运行时为零。

items.label: VEH_FUEL_RATE
items.name: Vehicle Fuel Rate
items.note: Includes fuel consumed by engine and aftertreatment system. Excludes fuel-operated heater.

pids.note: Manufacturers shall support both engine and vehicle fuel rate even if no aftertreatment fuel is used (both report the same value). For dual-fuel engines, FUEL_RATE reports total fuel used.

pids.name: Engine Exhaust Flow Rate
pids.description: Measured/calculated exhaust gas mass flow upstream of aftertreatment system. 0.2 kg/h per bit, 0~13107.0 kg/h. Averaged over last 1000 ms, multiplied by 3600 to convert s→h. Zero when engine not running.
pids.description_zh: 后处理系统上游的测量/计算排气质量流量。0.2 kg/h/位，0~13107.0 kg/h。取最近1000ms平均值，乘以3600将s转换为h。发动机未运行时为零。

pids.name: Fuel System Percentage Use
pids.description: Fuel system A/B use percentage for Banks 1-4. System A = Direct Injection / Diesel / Gasoline (primary). System B = Port Fuel Injection / CNG / alternative. For single fuel, only system A used. Values of A+B per bank normally add to 100%. 0% when engine not running or in decel fuel cutoff.
pids.description_zh: 气缸组1-4的燃油系统A/B使用百分比。系统A=直喷/柴油/汽油（主系统）。系统B=进气道喷射/CNG/替代燃料。单一燃料仅使用系统A。每组A+B通常合计100%。发动机未运行或减速断油时为0%。

items.label: FUELSYS_PCT_SUP
items.name: Support of Fuel System Percentage Use
items.name_zh: 燃油系统使用百分比支持

items.label: FUELSYSA_B1
items.name: Fuel System A Use Percentage Bank 1
items.name_zh: 燃油系统A使用百分比 气缸组1

items.label: FUELSYSB_B1
items.name: Fuel System B Use Percentage Bank 1
items.name_zh: 燃油系统B使用百分比 气缸组1

items.label: FUELSYSA_B2
items.name: Fuel System A Use Percentage Bank 2
items.name_zh: 燃油系统A使用百分比 气缸组2

items.label: FUELSYSB_B2
items.name: Fuel System B Use Percentage Bank 2
items.name_zh: 燃油系统B使用百分比 气缸组2

items.label: FUELSYSA_B3
items.name: Fuel System A Use Percentage Bank 3
items.name_zh: 燃油系统A使用百分比 气缸组3

items.label: FUELSYSB_B3
items.name: Fuel System B Use Percentage Bank 3
items.name_zh: 燃油系统B使用百分比 气缸组3

items.label: FUELSYSA_B4
items.name: Fuel System A Use Percentage Bank 4
items.name_zh: 燃油系统A使用百分比 气缸组4

items.label: FUELSYSB_B4
items.name: Fuel System B Use Percentage Bank 4
items.name_zh: 燃油系统B使用百分比 气缸组4

pids.note: See PID $03 for fuel type information. PID $9F and PID $03 must define fuel systems in the same manner.
